title: CraftattackForFolia
description: A simple plugin that adds functionality as in CraftAttack - the German YouTube project - to Folia.
body:
# CraftAttackForFolia  
CraftAttackForFolia is a simple plugin that adds functionality as in the German YouTube project CraftAttack into Folia. It was made by MHubertus in just a few hours, so it might contain some errors.
### Abilities
- Pressureplate that teleports back to spawn [✓]
- Spawn region protection [✓]
- /status command [✓]
- Spawn elytra [X] -> **TODO**
- MySQL Database integration [X] -> **TODO**
- Head drop after player dies [X]
- Voicechat [X]
### Approach
This plugin takes a different approach on how to calculate the spawn region. Instead of calculating the spawn area as a cuboid, it is being calculated as a sphere. To avoid confusion with the placement of the pressure plate, there is a setup command.
### Setup
To setup the spawn area, you can simply use '*/setup*' and you will be guided. 
### Commands
- `/status <statusName>`
- `/setup <guide/spawn/plate>` -> *only OP's*
### Config
```
name: "CraftAttackX"
status_permission: "ca.status"
```
